publishedAbstract: - A user attempts to delete a NooBaa BackingStore that is no longer desired, but the deletion fails with the following error: ~~~ $ noobaa backingstore delete noobaa-default-backing-store-n openshift-storage FATA[0001] ❌ Could not delete BackingStore "noobaa-default-backing-store" in namespace "openshift-storage" as it is being used by one or more buckets ~~~
publishedTitle: NooBaa BackingStore will not Delete "as it is being used by one or more buckets"
